purpose: Authenticate complete generated self-play trajectories and map every filtered atomic-bin-v2 record to exactly one trajectory without changing the 64-byte record.

entry.order: strictly increasing first_record; ranges are contiguous and cover the logical manifest dataset exactly

fields.name: first_record
fields.semantics: zero-based logical record index after concatenating manifest shards in canonical array order

fields.name: record_count
fields.semantics: retained samples only; filters, the final target-count prefix and deterministic cross-split feature decontamination may omit other plies from the complete played trajectory

fields.name: first_move
fields.semantics: zero-based index in the trailing move-wire array

move_stream.order: complete played move sequence for entry 0, then entry 1, with no holes or overlap
move_stream.castling_semantics: destination is the rook-origin square, exactly as atomic-bin-v2

component_encodings.root_position_bytes48: the exact canonical atomic-bin-v2 48-byte root position
component_encodings.atomic960_u8: 0 for orthodox initial geometry and 1 for Atomic960
component_encodings.move_count_u64_le: number of complete move wires, widened to unsigned uint64 and encoded little-endian
component_encodings.complete_move_wires_u32_le: exactly move_count canonical atomic-bin-v2 move wires, each encoded unsigned uint32 little-endian in played order

split_group_id.label_free: terminal_result and stop_reason are deliberately excluded so changing a label or adjudication cannot move the same position trajectory across train and validation

partition.canonical_config_source: the authenticated coverage-policy.partition object; both role statistics and the split audit repeat and verify its config hash, method, seed, threshold and generation provenance
partition.publication: buffer one complete generated trajectory, calculate its label-free split group ID and role, then publish every retained record as one logical batch to only that role

verification.record_ranges: first entry starts at record 0; every next first_record equals prior first_record + prior record_count; final range ends at header.record_count
verification.move_ranges: first entry starts at move 0; every next first_move equals prior first_move + prior move_count; final range ends at header.move_count
verification.position_replay: set root_position and replay the complete legal move stream; mapped record ply values are strictly increasing and below entry.move_count; record.ply selects the zero-based pre-move position and its canonical 48-byte position and Atomic960 flag must match
verification.move_semantics: the record move is the searched best move and may differ from the played move stream after randomization; both must independently be legal and must never be compared for equality
verification.result_replay: convert terminal_result from white perspective to each mapped record's side-to-move perspective and require exact equality
verification.terminal_replay: atomic-outcome must finish at a real Atomic terminal; every adjudicated reason must satisfy the authenticated generator policy in the dataset manifest
verification.dataset_binding: header record count and manifest hash must match; logical records use canonical manifest shard order
verification.split_binding: authenticate the one coverage policy, require both role statistics and the split audit to repeat its exact partition config and generation provenance, then recompute every label-free split group ID and partition hash using policy.partition.split_seed and policy.partition.validation_threshold_u64; the resulting role must equal the header role
verification.overflow: all offset, count, multiplication and file-size arithmetic is checked in uint64 before access

file_policy.historical_atomic_bin_v2: cannot be upgraded with a trusted trajectory ledger because filtered moves were not retained
